# Claude Fable 5 Prompt Analysis

> Analysis of 12 Claude system prompts from 3.5 Sonnet to Fable 5
> Source: [CL4R1T4S by elder-plinius](https://github.com/elder-plinius/CL4R1T4S/tree/main/ANTHROPIC)
> Repo: [vibe-investing/Claude_Fable5_Prompt](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/vibe-investing/tree/main/Claude_Fable5_Prompt)

## Quick Links

- [README.md](README.md) -- Full analysis report (Korean)
- [README_EN.md](README_EN.md) -- Full analysis report (English)

## Key Findings

| # | Discovery | Detail |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | Fable 5 = Mythos 5 + Safety | Same base model, Fable has guardrails, Mythos is unrestricted (approved orgs only) |
| 2 | Mythos-tier introduced | New model class above Opus (Mythos > Opus > Sonnet > Haiku) |
| 3 | Model strings leaked | claude-fable-5, claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 |
| 4 | Knowledge cutoff: Jan 2026 | Auto-searches for anything that could have changed |
| 5 | Copyright HARD LIMIT | 15-word quote limit, 1 quote per source, lyrics/poetry absolutely banned |
| 6 | End Conversation tool | For abusive users; never used during self-harm/crisis |
| 7 | MCP Opt-in required | User must explicitly choose before third-party tools are called |
| 8 | Artifact persistent storage | window.storage enables cross-session journals, trackers, leaderboards |
| 9 | Memory is opt-in | Must be enabled in Settings; default is no memories |
| 10 | No flattery / no excessive apology | Acknowledge mistakes, stay on problem, maintain self-respect |

## Collected Versions

| Version | Knowledge Cutoff | Key Feature |
|---------|-----------------|-------------|
| Claude Fable 5 | Jan 2026 | Mythos-tier, latest |
| Claude Opus 4.7 | Jan 2026 | Search First, Tool Discovery |
| Claude Opus 4.6 | Jan 2026 | MCP Apps, Persistent Storage |
| Claude 4.5 Opus | Jan 2025 | Past Chats, Citation hardening |
| Claude Sonnet 4.5 | Jan 2025 | Artifact enhancements |
| Claude 4.1 (Opus 4.1) | Jan 2025 | Drug refusal, Citation |
| Claude Sonnet 4 | Jan 2025 | Memory System introduced |
| Claude Sonnet 3.7 | -- | Reasoning model |
| Claude Sonnet 3.5 | Apr 2024 | Basic Artifacts |
| Claude Code | -- | CLI agent |
| UserStyle Modes | -- | Explanatory/Formal/Concise |

## Directory Structure

```
Claude_Fable5_Prompt/
├── README.md                       -- Korean analysis report
├── README_EN.md                    -- English analysis report
├── llms.txt                        -- Index (this file)
├── Claude_Fable5_포스팅.txt        -- LinkedIn/Facebook post templates
│
├── prompts/                        -- Extracted practical prompt patterns
│   ├── search_instructions/        -- Search query complexity, copyright compliance
│   ├── tone_formatting/            -- Bullet rules, emoji limits, conversational tone
│   ├── safety_guidelines/          -- Refusal handling, child safety, copyright
│   ├── user_wellbeing/             -- Self-harm, crisis, eating disorder protocols
│   ├── computer_use/               -- Skill system, file creation, Linux environment
│   ├── product_info/               -- Model strings, lineup, knowledge cutoff
│   ├── artifacts/                  -- window.storage API, React libraries, Claude-in-Claude
│   ├── memory_system/              -- Conversation search, past chats tools
│   ├── mcp_apps/                   -- Connector suggestions, opt-in workflow
│   ├── evenhandedness/             -- Political neutrality framing
│   └── refusal_handling/           -- Refusal flavors, abuse protocols
│
├── evolution/                      -- Inter-version evolution analysis
│   ├── search_strategy_evolution.md
│   ├── safety_policy_evolution.md
│   └── feature_timeline.md
│
├── techniques/                     -- Prompt engineering techniques
│   ├── xml_tagging.md
│   ├── refusal_patterns.md
│   ├── research_category_system.md
│   └── skill_system_pattern.md
│
└── versions/                       -- Original prompt references (11 versions)
    ├── fable_5.md
    ├── opus_4_7.txt
    ├── opus_4_6.txt
    ├── opus_4_5.txt
    ├── sonnet_4_5.txt
    ├── claude_4_1.txt
    ├── sonnet_4.txt
    ├── sonnet_3_7.txt
    ├── sonnet_3_5.md
    ├── claude_code.md
    └── userstyle_modes.md
```
